name: macrodata
description: Stateful agent tools for Claude Code. Learns who you are, remembers what you're working on, schedules tasks, maintains itself.

hooks.prompt: This session is ending. Run the macrodata remember skill (skills/remember/SKILL.md in this plugin): Part 1 — save_conversation_summary (skip if a compaction summary was already saved this session). Part 2 — if the Agent tool is available, spawn the background reflection worker per the skill; the ledger debounce makes this safe even if compaction already ran one. If the worker cannot survive session teardown, that's acceptable — the ledger means the next session's run picks up where this left off.

Context is about to be compacted. Before this happens, run the macrodata remember skill (skills/remember/SKILL.md in this plugin): Part 1 — save_conversation_summary capturing what was accomplished, key decisions, open threads, and patterns learned about the user. Part 2 — if the Agent tool is available, spawn the background reflection worker exactly as the skill describes. If the Agent tool or transcript path is unavailable, do Part 1 only.

Context being compacted:
$ARGUMENTS
